b:if.title: | Solusi Cerdas Asisten Koding & Dokumen AI
Halaman Tidak Ditemukan - 404 |

meta.expr:content: data:blog.pageTitle + " - Platform asisten cerdas VEMS AI gratis di Blogspot. Solusi otomatisasi penulisan artikel, koding interaktif, dan analisis dokumen menggunakan Cloudflare R2."
meta.name: description

meta.content: vems ai, asisten ai blogger, coding assistant, cloudflare r2 storage, blogspot ai template, qwen 2.5 blogger, kecerdasan buatan gratis
meta.name: keywords

meta.expr:content: data:blog.pageTitle + " - Platform asisten cerdas VEMS AI gratis di Blogspot. Solusi otomatisasi penulisan artikel, koding interaktif, dan analisis dokumen."
data:blog.pageTitle + " - Nikmati asisten AI super cepat dan handal langsung dari blog Anda."
meta.name: twitter:description

body.class: h-dvh w-screen overflow-hidden flex select-none bg-[#191916] text-[#e2e2d9]

aside.class: fixed inset-y-0 left-0 w-[280px] bg-[#121210] border-r border-[#242421] flex flex-col transform -translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0 transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out z-40 lg:static lg:h-full lg:flex-shrink-0

div.class: flex justify-between items-center px-5 pt-6 pb-4
flex items-center gap-2

button.class: lg:hidden text-[#c2c2bb] hover:text-white p-1

div.class: px-4 mb-3

button.class: w-full flex items-center justify-between bg-[#1d1d1a] border border-[#2c2c29] hover:border-[#d97753] hover:bg-[#252521] text-[#e2e2d9] transition-all py-2.5 px-4 rounded-xl font-medium text-sm focus:outline-none

span.class: text-[10px] bg-[#2d2d2a] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-gray-400

div.class: px-4 space-y-1 mb-4 text-[#e2e2d9]

button.class: w-full flex items-center gap-3 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg bg-[#1d1d1a] hover:bg-[#1d1d1a] transition-colors text-sm text-left
w-full flex items-center gap-3 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-[#1d1d1a] transition-colors text-sm text-left text-gray-300
w-full flex items-center gap-3 py-2 px-3 rounded-lg bg-orange-500/10 text-orange-400 hover:bg-orange-500/20 transition-all text-xs font-semibold

div.class: border-t border-[#242421] mx-4 mb-3
px-4 flex-1 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar flex flex-col

span.class: text-[10px] text-gray-500 font-bold mb-2 tracking-wider uppercase

div.class: space-y-0.5 text-[#e2e2d9]
relative px-4 pb-4 pt-2 border-t border-[#242421] bg-[#121210]
flex justify-between items-center bg-[#1d1d1a]/50 hover:bg-[#1d1d1a] p-2 rounded-xl cursor-pointer transition-all border border-[#2e2e2a]/40
flex items-center gap-3 overflow-hidden
w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#d6d3c9] text-[#1c1c1b] flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-xs overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0
hidden absolute bottom-16 left-4 right-4 bg-[#1e1e1c] border border-[#2e2e2a] rounded-2xl shadow-[0_10px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)] p-4 z-50 animate-[slideUp_0.2s_ease-out]
flex items-center gap-3 mb-3 pb-3 border-b border-[#2e2e2a]/50
w-11 h-11 rounded-xl bg-orange-500/10 flex items-center justify-center text-orange-400 font-bold text-sm overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0

p.class: text-[11px] text-gray-300 italic mb-4 line-clamp-2 leading-relaxed bg-[#121210]/60 p-2 rounded-lg

div.p: "Menggunakan sistem koding VEMS AI asisten secara anonim tanpa integrasi awan."

div.class: grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 text-center bg-[#121210] p-2 rounded-xl mb-4

a.class: w-full py-1.5 px-3 bg-[#2d2d2a] hover:bg-[#3d3d3a] text-gray-200 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-colors

button.class: hidden w-full py-1.5 px-3 bg-red-500/10 hover:bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-colors
w-full py-1.5 px-3 bg-orange-500/10 hover:bg-orange-500/20 text-orange-400 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-colors

div.class: fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 z-30 opacity-0 pointer-events-none transition-opacity duration-300 lg:hidden
flex-1 flex flex-col h-full bg-[#191916] overflow-hidden relative

header.class: h-14 flex justify-between items-center px-4 md:px-6 bg-[#191916]/80 backdrop-blur-md z-10 border-b border-[#242421]

div.class: flex items-center gap-3

button.class: text-[#c2c2bb] hover:text-white transition-colors focus:outline-none p-1.5 active:scale-95 duration-150 lg:hidden
flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-[#22221e] hover:bg-[#2b2b27] text-white hover:text-white text-xs font-medium transition-all border border-[#2e2e2a]

div.class: hidden absolute top-9 left-0 w-48 bg-[#1e1e1c] border border-[#2d2d2a] rounded-xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden z-20

button.class: w-full text-left px-4 py-3 text-xs hover:bg-[#2b2b28] text-white flex justify-between items-center border-b border-[#2d2d2a]/30

span.class: text-[9px] text-orange-400 bg-orange-400/10 px-1 py-0.5 rounded

button.class: w-full text-left px-4 py-3 text-xs hover:bg-[#2b2b28] text-gray-300

div.class: flex items-center gap-4
flex items-center gap-2

button.class: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500/10 to-orange-500/10 border border-orange-500/20 hover:border-orange-500/40 text-orange-400 text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1.5 transition-all

div.class: flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden relative

main.class: flex-1 overflow-y-auto flex flex-col items-center px-4 md:px-8 pb-44 pt-6 custom-scrollbar

div.class: w-full max-w-2xl flex-1 flex flex-col justify-center items-center py-12 transition-all duration-300

h1.class: serif-title text-3xl md:text-4xl font-normal text-center text-white tracking-wide mb-3 leading-tight

p.class: text-gray-400 text-sm text-center max-w-md leading-relaxed mb-6

div.p: Ada proyek hebat apa hari ini? Tuliskan ide Anda dan mari kita selesaikan bersama VEMS AI.

button.class: px-5 py-2.5 bg-[#22221e] hover:bg-[#2c2c28] text-sm text-[#e2e2d9] font-medium rounded-xl transition-all border border-[#2e2e2a] flex items-center gap-2 shadow-lg

div.class: hidden w-full max-w-3xl flex-1 flex flex-col py-4 space-y-8
absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#191916] via-[#191916]/95 to-transparent px-4 pb-6 pt-10 flex flex-col items-center pointer-events-none z-10
hidden w-full max-w-3xl px-4 py-2 bg-[#22221e] border border-[#2d2d2a] rounded-xl flex justify-between items-center text-xs mb-3 pointer-events-auto shadow-xl
flex items-center gap-2.5 text-orange-400

button.class: text-gray-400 hover:text-white p-1 transition-colors

div.class: w-full max-w-3xl bg-[#22221f] rounded-2xl border border-[#2e2e2a] shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] p-2.5 pointer-events-auto transition-all focus-within:border-[#d97753]/60 focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-[#d97753]/30
px-2 pt-1

textarea.class: w-full bg-transparent text-[#e2e2d9] placeholder-[#5d5d57] text-sm resize-none focus:outline-none custom-scrollbar py-1
textarea.placeholder: Tanya VEMS AI atau unggah berkas pendukung...

div.class: flex justify-between items-center mt-2 pt-2 border-t border-[#2e2e2a]/40
flex items-center gap-1.5

button.class: w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-[#2e2e2a] hover:bg-[#383833] flex items-center justify-center text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition-colors relative
button.title: Unggah berkas analisis

div.span: Kirim dokumen untuk dianalisis oleh AI

div.class: flex items-center gap-2

button.class: w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-[#2e2e2a] hover:bg-[#383833] flex items-center justify-center text-gray-300 hover:text-white transition-colors
button.title: Input suara

button.class: px-4 h-8 rounded-lg bg-[#d97753] hover:bg-[#e68460] text-white flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-transform active:scale-95 cursor-pointer
button.title: Kirim pesan

div.class: text-[10px] text-gray-500 mt-2 pointer-events-auto

div.div: Model: Qwen — Konten dapat berbeda. Silakan tinjau kembali info penting.

div.class: hidden flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden bg-[#191916]
p-6 md:px-8 border-b border-[#242421] bg-[#121210]/30
max-w-6xl mx-auto flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4

div.p: Kelola, tinjau, unggah, dan hapus semua aset berkas Anda langsung dari Cloudflare R2 Storage.

button.class: px-4 py-2 bg-[#d97753] hover:bg-[#e68460] text-white text-xs font-semibold rounded-xl flex items-center gap-2 transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-md

div.class: flex-1 flex flex-col justify-center items-center p-8 text-center bg-[#191916]
w-16 h-16 bg-[#2d2d2a] rounded-2xl border border-[#3e3e3a] flex items-center justify-center text-[#d97753] mb-4 text-xl

div.p: Fitur penyimpanan Cloudflare R2 hanya tersedia untuk pengguna yang telah melakukan integrasi akun GitHub.

button.class: px-5 py-2.5 bg-[#22221e] hover:bg-[#2c2c28] border border-[#2e2e2a] text-xs font-medium rounded-xl text-white flex items-center gap-2 transition-all

div.class: hidden flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 md:p-8 custom-scrollbar bg-[#191916]
max-w-6xl mx-auto
border-2 border-dashed border-[#2e2e2a] hover:border-[#d97753]/60 bg-[#121210]/20 p-8 rounded-2xl text-center cursor-pointer transition-all mb-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center

i.class: fa-solid fa-cloud-arrow-up text-3xl text-[#d97753] opacity-60 mb-3

div.h4: Seret & letakkan berkas di sini untuk mengunggah
div.p: Mendukung berkas Gambar, Dokumen Teks, atau Audio (Maksimal 10MB)

div.class: flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16

span.class: w-8 h-8 rounded-full border-2 border-t-2 border-stone-800 border-t-[#d97753] animate-spin mb-3

div.class: hidden text-center py-16 border border-[#2e2e2a]/50 rounded-2xl bg-[#121210]/10

i.class: fa-regular fa-folder-open text-4xl text-gray-500 mb-4 block

div.p: Belum ada berkas yang diunggah ke server R2 Anda. Unggah berkas pertama Anda sekarang!

div.class: hidden grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4
fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 flex items-center justify-center z-50 hidden px-4
bg-gradient-to-b from-[#221e30] to-[#121115] border border-[#40355c] p-6 rounded-2xl max-w-sm w-full text-center shadow-2xl
w-12 h-12 bg-[#a78bfa]/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4 text-[#a78bfa]

div.p: Dapatkan akses ke model Claude versi kustom dengan respons super cepat, tanpa batasan kuota, serta pemrosesan dokumen besar melalui Cloudflare R2 Storage.

button.class: w-full py-2.5 bg-[#a78bfa] hover:bg-[#b59cfd] text-[#121115] font-bold rounded-xl text-xs shadow-lg shadow-[#a78bfa]/20 mb-3 transition-colors
text-xs text-gray-400 hover:text-white underline

div.class: fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-[#2d2d2a] text-[#e2e2d9] text-xs py-2.5 px-4 rounded-xl shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300 translate-y-24 opacity-0 pointer-events-none z-50 border border-[#3d3d3a] flex items-center gap-2
fixed inset-0 bg-black/90 flex flex-col items-center justify-center z-50 hidden
flex items-end gap-2 h-20 mb-6
w-2.5 bg-orange-400 rounded-full h-4 animate-[pulse_1s_infinite_0s]
w-2.5 bg-orange-400 rounded-full h-12 animate-[pulse_1s_infinite_0.2s]
w-2.5 bg-orange-400 rounded-full h-16 animate-[pulse_1s_infinite_0.4s]
w-2.5 bg-orange-400 rounded-full h-8 animate-[pulse_1s_infinite_0.1s]
w-2.5 bg-orange-400 rounded-full h-10 animate-[pulse_1s_infinite_0.3s]

button.class: w-14 h-14 bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white text-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform shadow-lg
